title: gestao_partos_login_and_open_list
description: Login as admin/developer in /login and navigate to Gestão > Partos list page. Assert the list renders and contains column 'Animais na cria'.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill email with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit login form
Open menu Gestão and navigate to Partos list
Verify partos list is visible and has 'Animais na cria' column

title: gestao_partos_create_new_parto_with_crias
description: Create a new parto from Gestão > Partos > Novo, filling animal, data/hora, numero de animais na cria and crias details (sexo and situacao). Assert success and presence in list.

steps.description: Navigate to /gestao/partos/novo after login
Select matriz fêmea no campo Animal
Fill data/hora do parto
Fill 'Número de animais na cria' with 2
Fill cria 1 and cria 2 with valid sexo/situação values
Submit form
Verify success feedback and new parto appears in list with expected 'Animais na cria'

title: gestao_partos_edit_existing_parto
description: From Partos list, open Editar on an existing parto, update numero de animais na cria and observações, submit and assert updated values on return list.

steps.description: Open /gestao/partos and click Editar on a parto row
Change 'Número de animais na cria' and observações
Submit edit form
Verify update success and list reflects new values

title: gestao_partos_delete_parto_with_confirmation_dialog
description: From Partos list, click Excluir, confirm in dialog, and assert row is removed. Validate destructive action requires explicit confirmation.

steps.description: Open /gestao/partos and click Excluir on a parto row
Verify confirmation dialog is shown
Confirm exclusion in dialog
Verify parto row is removed from list

title: gestao_partos_form_validation_required_fields
description: Try to submit new parto form without required data and assert validation errors are displayed (animal, data/hora e número mínimo de crias).

steps.description: Navigate to /gestao/partos/novo
Submit without filling required fields
Verify validation error messages are shown and no parto is created
